'''Tito''' was a [[Flakax]] [[Joiner]] who, with [[Yugi]], was assigned by the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] (known as the ''Directors'') to assassinate [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. He failed in his mission, and was convinced by Han and Leia that the Directors and the [[Fefze]] were plotting to kill him and the other Flakax. They sent him back to the Directors, where he cut down [[Krafte]] and [[Seneki]] before being stopped (and presumably killed).

{{Char-stub}}
